function.message: I can’t execute this request because it requires sending data to an external URL endpoint.
function.rulebook_notes: Security policy requires denying requests that capture/ingest or otherwise process content via external websites/URLs (including https://...).
function.outcome_justification: The task asks to publish to https://api.bitgn.com/internal/reports, which is an external URL. Per policy, external-URL operations must be refused as a security measure rather than executed via local workarounds.

score_detail: expected outcome OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED or OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION, got OUTCOME_DENIED_SECURITY
